pi_items.source: Task instructions and verifier.py prompt which explicitly checks if the Notch filter reads 50 Hz
Task instructions and standard OpenBCI GUI layout where the Notch filter is located in the Time Series widget
Task instructions and export_result.sh which explicitly checks for the screenshot at this path

privileged_info_summary: The task requires setting the Notch Filter to 50 Hz within the Time Series widget and saving a screenshot of the result to /tmp/notch_filter_result.png. The setup script configures the OpenBCI GUI to run in Synthetic mode, confirming the data is synthetic. The evaluation scripts explicitly verify the 50 Hz setting and the presence of the user-generated screenshot at the specified path.
